question: Write a simple LRU cache with get and set operations. Show in TypeScript, Python, and Go.
Write a debounce function that delays execution until N ms after the last call. Show in TypeScript and Python.
Write a function that flattens a deeply nested array to a single level. Show in TypeScript, Python, Go, and Rust.
Write a simple publish-subscribe event emitter with on, off, and emit. Show in TypeScript and Python.
Write a function that throttles calls to at most once per N milliseconds. Show in TypeScript and Python.
